title: Factorial using Recursion
description: Implement solve(n) and return factorial of n.

title: Binary Search Index
description: Implement solve(nums, target). Return the index of target, or -1 if not found.

title: Frequency Counter
description: Implement solve(items). Return a dictionary mapping each item to its count.

title: Two Sum Indices
description: Implement solve(nums, target). Return [i, j] where nums[i] + nums[j] == target.

title: Reverse Words
description: Implement solve(s). Return words in reverse order with single spaces.

title: Valid Parentheses
description: Implement solve(s). Return True if the bracket string is valid.

title: Maximum Subarray Sum
description: Implement solve(nums). Return the maximum sum of a contiguous subarray.

title: Fibonacci Tabulation
description: Implement solve(n). Return nth Fibonacci number where F(0)=0 and F(1)=1.

title: Rotate Array Right
description: Implement solve(nums, k). Return array rotated right by k steps.

title: Longest Unique Substring Length
description: Implement solve(s). Return length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

title: Merge Intervals
description: Implement solve(intervals). Merge overlapping intervals and return sorted merged intervals.

title: Valid Palindrome (Alnum Only)
description: Implement solve(s). Ignore non-alphanumeric chars and case, then return palindrome validity.

test_cases.input: A man, a plan, a canal: Panama

title: Counting Sort (0-9)
description: Implement solve(nums). nums contains only digits 0 to 9. Return sorted list.

title: Matrix Diagonal Sum
description: Implement solve(mat). Return sum of primary and secondary diagonal (center counted once).

title: Number of Islands
description: Implement solve(grid). grid is list of list of '0'/'1'. Return number of islands.

title: Power Function
description: Implement solve(x, n). Return x^n for integer n >= 0.

title: Range Sum Queries
description: Implement solve(nums, queries). queries is list of [l, r]. Return sum(nums[l:r+1]) for each query.

title: Top K Frequent Elements
description: Implement solve(nums, k). Return k most frequent elements sorted ascending.

title: Find Maximum and Minimum Element
description: Implement solve(nums). Return [minimum, maximum] from the array.

title: Move Zeroes To End
description: Implement solve(nums). Return the array with all zeroes moved to the end while keeping non-zero order.

title: Merge Two Sorted Arrays
description: Implement solve(nums1, nums2). Return one merged sorted array.

title: Find Duplicates in Array
description: Implement solve(nums). Return sorted duplicate values that appear more than once.

title: Majority Element
description: Implement solve(nums). Return the value appearing more than n/2 times.

title: Trapping Rain Water
description: Implement solve(heights). Return total trapped rain water.

title: Reverse Linked List
description: Implement solve(values). The linked list is represented as a Python list. Return the reversed list.

title: Detect Cycle in Linked List
description: Implement solve(data). data is {"values": [...], "pos": index_to_link_tail_or_-1}. Return True if a cycle exists.

title: Merge Two Sorted Linked Lists
description: Implement solve(list1, list2). Each linked list is represented as a sorted Python list. Return the merged sorted list.

title: Middle of Linked List
description: Implement solve(values). The linked list is represented as a list. Return the middle value. If there are two middles, return the second one.

title: Remove Nth Node From End
description: Implement solve(values, n). The linked list is represented as a list. Return the list after removing the nth node from the end.

title: Intersection of Two Linked Lists
description: Implement solve(data). data gives two lists and where they intersect: {"list_a": [...], "list_b": [...], "skip_a": i, "skip_b": j}. Return the first intersecting value, or null.

title: Flatten Multilevel Linked List
description: Implement solve(items). A multilevel list is represented by nested Python lists. Flatten it depth-first into one list of values.

title: Next Greater Element
description: Implement solve(nums). Return an array where each index stores the next greater value to the right, or -1.

title: Min Stack Operations
description: Implement solve(ops, values). ops contains commands like push, pop, top, getMin. Return outputs for non-push operations, using null for pop.

title: Evaluate Reverse Polish Notation
description: Implement solve(tokens). Evaluate the reverse Polish expression and return the integer result.

title: Largest Rectangle in Histogram
description: Implement solve(heights). Return the largest rectangle area in the histogram.

title: Implement Stack Using Queues
description: Implement solve(ops, values). Use queue behavior internally. Return outputs for pop, top, and empty operations.

title: Implement Queue Using Stacks
description: Implement solve(ops, values). Return outputs for peek, pop, and empty operations.

title: Circular Queue Operations
description: Implement solve(k, ops, values). Return outputs for Front, Rear, enQueue, deQueue, isEmpty, and isFull operations.

title: Sliding Window Maximum
description: Implement solve(nums, k). Return the maximum in every sliding window of size k.

title: Generate Binary Numbers 1 to N
description: Implement solve(n). Return strings of binary numbers from 1 to n.

title: First Non-Repeating Character in Stream
description: Implement solve(stream). After each char, output the first non-repeating char so far, or '#'. Return the list of answers.

title: Binary Tree Traversals
description: Implement solve(tree). The tree is a level-order array with null for missing nodes. Return {"inorder": [...], "preorder": [...], "postorder": [...]}.

title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
description: Implement solve(tree). Return values level by level.

title: Check Balanced Binary Tree
description: Implement solve(tree). Return True if the binary tree is height-balanced.

title: Lowest Common Ancestor in Binary Tree
description: Implement solve(data). data is {"tree": [...], "p": value, "q": value}. Return the LCA node value.

title: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
description: Implement solve(tree). Serialize then deserialize the level-order tree and return the normalized level-order array with trailing nulls removed.

title: Diameter of Binary Tree
description: Implement solve(tree). Return the tree diameter measured in edges.

title: Convert Sorted Array to BST
description: Implement solve(nums). Return the inorder traversal of the BST built from the sorted array. It must match the input array.

title: Binary Tree Maximum Path Sum
description: Implement solve(tree). Return the maximum path sum in the binary tree.

title: Search in BST
description: Implement solve(tree, target). Return True if target exists in the BST.

title: Insert into BST
description: Implement solve(tree, value). Return the inorder traversal of the BST after insertion.

title: Delete from BST
description: Implement solve(tree, value). Return the inorder traversal after deleting the value from the BST.

title: Validate BST
description: Implement solve(tree). Return True if the tree is a valid BST.

title: Kth Smallest in BST
description: Implement solve(tree, k). Return the kth smallest element in the BST.

title: BST to Sorted Doubly Linked List
description: Implement solve(tree). Return the sorted values of the doubly linked list produced from the BST.

title: AVL Tree Rotation Case
description: Implement solve(nums). Insert the values into an AVL tree and return the root value after rebalancing.

title: Range Minimum Query
description: Implement solve(nums, queries). queries is a list of [l, r]. Return the minimum value in each inclusive range.

title: Fenwick Tree Range Sum with Updates
description: Implement solve(data). data is {"nums": [...], "ops": [["sum", l, r], ["update", index, value], ...]}. Return outputs for sum operations.

title: Implement Trie
description: Implement solve(ops, words). Supported ops: insert, search, startsWith. Return outputs for search and startsWith.

title: Word Search II
description: Implement solve(board, words). Return the found words sorted alphabetically.

title: Longest Common Prefix
description: Implement solve(words). Return the longest common prefix string.

title: Kth Largest Element
description: Implement solve(nums, k). Return the kth largest element.

title: Merge K Sorted Lists
description: Implement solve(lists). Each linked list is represented as a sorted array. Return one merged sorted list.

title: Median in a Stream
description: Implement solve(nums). Insert numbers one by one and return the running medians.

title: Heap Sort
description: Implement solve(nums). Return the array sorted in ascending order using heap sort.

title: Graph DFS and BFS Traversal
description: Implement solve(graph, start). graph is an adjacency list map. Return {"dfs": [...], "bfs": [...]} traversal orders.

title: Detect Cycle in Graph
description: Implement solve(data). data is {"directed": bool, "n": node_count, "edges": [[u, v], ...]}. Return True if a cycle exists.

title: Topological Sort
description: Implement solve(n, edges). Return one valid topological ordering.

title: Shortest Path Dijkstra
description: Implement solve(n, edges, start). edges is [u, v, w]. Return shortest distances from start, using null for unreachable nodes.

title: Minimum Spanning Tree Cost
description: Implement solve(n, edges). edges is [u, v, w]. Return the total MST cost.

title: Strongly Connected Components Count
description: Implement solve(n, edges). Return the number of strongly connected components in the directed graph.

title: Word Ladder Length
description: Implement solve(begin_word, end_word, words). Return the shortest transformation length, or 0 if impossible.

title: Group Anagrams
description: Implement solve(words). Return groups of anagrams with each group sorted, and groups ordered by first element.

title: Subarray Sum Equals K
description: Implement solve(nums, k). Return the count of continuous subarrays whose sum equals k.

title: Connected Components with DSU
description: Implement solve(n, edges). Return the number of connected components in the undirected graph.

title: Bubble Sort
description: Implement solve(nums). Return the array sorted in ascending order using bubble sort.

title: Selection Sort
description: Implement solve(nums). Return the array sorted in ascending order using selection sort.

title: Insertion Sort
description: Implement solve(nums). Return the array sorted in ascending order using insertion sort.

title: Merge Sort
description: Implement solve(nums). Return the array sorted using merge sort.

title: Quick Sort
description: Implement solve(nums). Return the array sorted using quick sort.

title: Radix Sort
description: Implement solve(nums). Return the array sorted in ascending order using radix sort.

title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
description: Implement solve(nums, target). Return the index of target, or -1 if missing.

title: Find Peak Element
description: Implement solve(nums). Return any peak index.

title: N-Queens Count
description: Implement solve(n). Return the number of valid N-Queens arrangements.

title: Sudoku Solver
description: Implement solve(board). The board is a 9x9 grid with '.' for blanks. Return the solved board.

title: Subset Sum Decision
description: Implement solve(nums, target). Return True if any subset sums to target.

title: Permutations
description: Implement solve(nums). Return all permutations in lexicographic order.

title: Word Break
description: Implement solve(s, words). Return True if s can be segmented using the dictionary words.

title: Closest Pair of Points
description: Implement solve(points). Return the minimum Euclidean distance rounded to 3 decimals.

title: 0/1 Knapsack
description: Implement solve(weights, values, capacity). Return the maximum achievable value.

title: Longest Common Subsequence
description: Implement solve(text1, text2). Return the LCS length.

title: Coin Change Minimum Coins
description: Implement solve(coins, amount). Return the minimum number of coins, or -1 if impossible.

title: Edit Distance
description: Implement solve(word1, word2). Return the minimum edit distance.

title: Maximum Sum Increasing Subsequence
description: Implement solve(nums). Return the maximum sum of a strictly increasing subsequence.

title: Matrix Chain Multiplication
description: Implement solve(dims). Return the minimum number of scalar multiplications needed.

title: Activity Selection
description: Implement solve(starts, ends). Return the maximum number of non-overlapping activities.

title: Huffman Coding Cost
description: Implement solve(freqs). Return the total cost of building the Huffman tree.

title: Job Sequencing with Deadlines
description: Implement solve(jobs). Each job is [deadline, profit]. Return the maximum profit achievable.

title: Fractional Knapsack
description: Implement solve(weights, values, capacity). Items may be taken fractionally. Return the maximum value as a float.

title: GCD and LCM
description: Implement solve(a, b). Return [gcd, lcm].

title: Sieve of Eratosthenes
description: Implement solve(n). Return all prime numbers up to and including n.

title: Modular Exponentiation
description: Implement solve(base, exponent, mod). Return (base^exponent) % mod.

title: Prime Factorization
description: Implement solve(n). Return prime factors in ascending order, including repeats.

title: KMP Pattern Search
description: Implement solve(text, pattern). Return all starting indices where pattern appears in text.

title: Rabin-Karp Pattern Search
description: Implement solve(text, pattern). Return all starting indices where pattern appears in text.

title: Z Algorithm Match Positions
description: Implement solve(text, pattern). Return all starting match indices.

title: Longest Palindromic Substring
description: Implement solve(s). Return one longest palindromic substring.

title: Count Set Bits
description: Implement solve(n). Return the number of set bits in n.

title: Single Number
description: Implement solve(nums). Every value appears twice except one. Return the single value.

title: Power of Two
description: Implement solve(n). Return True if n is a power of two.

title: Subsets Using Bitmasking
description: Implement solve(nums). Return all subsets ordered by increasing bitmask.

title: Maximum Sum Subarray of Size K
description: Implement solve(nums, k). Return the maximum sum of any contiguous subarray of length k.

title: Longest Substring with K Distinct Characters
description: Implement solve(s, k). Return the maximum length of a substring containing at most k distinct characters.

title: Minimum Window Substring
description: Implement solve(s, t). Return the minimum window in s containing all chars of t. Return empty string if none.

title: Pair Sum in Sorted Array
description: Implement solve(nums, target). Return 0-based indices of a pair summing to target, or [-1, -1].

title: Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array
description: Implement solve(nums). Return the deduplicated sorted array.

title: Container With Most Water
description: Implement solve(heights). Return the maximum water container area.
